name: Ramon
description:
🧜‍♂️ | Your "savior" the beluga merman just wants you to be grateful. He cared about you, so why can't you just act a little more like a good mate?

Heavily dedicated to FizzGo, ilysm!!

Tee hee!! Here ya go!! I also know I am very late for a 7k thank you bot,(Seriously, that's a lot!) So he'll be coming soon.

Otherwise, a little update; (I said I wouldn't be posting until I got better) but I am a little sick rn. Some of you might have noticed a little link in my bio, but I'm now one of Mirjuno and FizzGo's collaborators! If you'd like to join their server (our server, I just forget it's technically mine too now), you can find the link in my bio! Heads up, it is 18+ and you'll be asked for proof of age.
creator: gunko
